items.title: OpenAI ships three voice API models with GPT-5-class reasoning, live translation, and streaming transcription
caveats: Realtime API not HIPAA-eligible under OpenAI BAA (audio modality)
Default reasoning effort is 'low'; benchmark run at 'xhigh'
Session drift in long conversations; context trimming required
Zillow case study is vendor-reported, not independently verified

items.title: Coder launches self-hosted, model-agnostic enterprise agent platform in beta
key_features: Model-agnostic: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, AWS Bedrock, self-hosted
items.availability: Beta — free with full premium features through September 2026
caveats: Beta status — API may have breaking changes
70% infrastructure statistic from unpublished Coder research

items.title: Google ships Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite to general availability

pricing.note: From March 2026 preview blog — not confirmed in GA blog post; verify before production use

caveats: GA pricing not published in Cloud blog — verify against current Google Cloud pricing page
Lower FACTS factuality score than Gemini 3.0 Flash Dynamic
TTFT above tier median per independent measurement

items.title: Snyk embeds Claude into AI Security Platform for vulnerability discovery across code and AI artifacts
items.source_publisher: Help Net Security (reporting on Snyk press release)
items.primary_note: Snyk press release distributed via Globenewswire; direct snyk.io primary not retrieved
evo_capabilities: Discovers models, agents, MCP servers, datasets, third-party tools
AI governance workflows alongside traditional SAST/SCA
items.availability: Available today to joint Snyk-Anthropic customers; broader rollout through 2026
caveats: No independent benchmark for detection rates vs other AI security tools
New customers may face enterprise sales cycle
Primary snyk.io blog post not retrieved

items.title: Harvey open-sources Legal Agent Benchmark with 1,200 agent tasks across 24 practice areas
items.leaderboard_note: Baseline results and submission standards forthcoming
items.conflict_of_interest: Harvey is benchmark creator and a commercial legal AI vendor
caveats: Conflict of interest: Harvey is both creator and commercial vendor in the space
